name: gitlab-mcp-server
description: MCP server exposing a self-hosted or hosted GitLab instance to LLM clients (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, etc.) over stdio. 21 tools across issues, MRs, time tracking, repository code, search, and CI logs.
author: Keivan Sina <keivan.sina@gmail.com>

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && node -e "if (JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('./package.json','utf8')).repository.url.includes('__REPO_URL__')) { console.error('Replace __REPO_URL__ in package.json before publishing'); process.exit(1) }"
